text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Maybe I didn't explain my problem accurately enough:

1. the program "gpg" is installed by security/gnupg1
If enigmail uses gpg2, IMHO the changed line in
/usr/ports/mail/enigmail/Makefile should then read:
...
        gpg2:${PORTSDIR}/security/gnupg
...

2. "gpg2" is not accepted by the installed thunderbird-enigmail plugin
as a valid gnupg installation. Shown plugin version: "Enigmail 1.4a1pre".
Thunderbird version: 7.0.1

What am I missing?
- -- 
Alfred Bartsch
Data-Service GmbH
